languages.text: Вы слышите жалобный треск поврежденного механизма. Теперь врата не закроются.

traits.locale_text: Вы слышите жалобный треск поврежденного механизма. Теперь врата не закроются.

languages.text: You hear the piteous rattle of the damaged mechanism. Now the gate will not close.
languages.original_text: Вы слышите жалобный треск поврежденного механизма. Теперь врата не закроются.

traits.locale_text: You hear the piteous rattle of the damaged mechanism. Now the gate will not close.
You hear the piteous rattle of the damaged mechanism. Now the gate will not close.
You hear the piteous rattle of the damaged mechanism. Now the gate will not close.

languages.text: Du hörst das klägliche Rasseln des beschädigten Mechanismus. Jetzt wird sich das Tor nicht schließen.
languages.original_text: You hear the piteous rattle of the damaged mechanism. Now the gate will not close.

traits.locale_text: Du hörst das klägliche Rasseln des beschädigten Mechanismus. Jetzt wird sich das Tor nicht schließen.

languages.text: 你听到损坏的机械发出凄惨的咔嗒声。这下大门关不上了。
languages.original_text: You hear the piteous rattle of the damaged mechanism. Now the gate will not close.

traits.locale_text: 你听到损坏的机械发出凄惨的咔嗒声。这下大门关不上了。

languages.text: Le mécanisme endommagé laisse échapper des plaintes navrantes. La porte ne pourra plus se fermer.
languages.original_text: You hear the piteous rattle of the damaged mechanism. Now the gate will not close.

traits.locale_text: Le mécanisme endommagé laisse échapper des plaintes navrantes. La porte ne pourra plus se fermer.

languages.text: Oyes el lastimoso estertor del mecanismo dañado. Ahora la puerta ya no se cerrará.
languages.original_text: You hear the piteous rattle of the damaged mechanism. Now the gate will not close.

traits.locale_text: Oyes el lastimoso estertor del mecanismo dañado. Ahora la puerta ya no se cerrará.

languages.text: Hasar görmüş mekanizmanın acınası tıkırtısını duyuyorsun. Artık kapı kapanmayacak.
languages.original_text: You hear the piteous rattle of the damaged mechanism. Now the gate will not close.

traits.locale_text: Hasar görmüş mekanizmanın acınası tıkırtısını duyuyorsun. Artık kapı kapanmayacak.

languages.text: 壊れた機構の悲鳴を聞く。もうゲートは閉まらない。
languages.original_text: You hear the piteous rattle of the damaged mechanism. Now the gate will not close.

traits.locale_text: 壊れた機構の悲鳴を聞く。もうゲートは閉まらない。
